summary: Frontend UI testing for landing hero mockup floating cards fix and new Agentis-style pricing pages. All requested features verified: (1) Landing hero floating cards NOT clipped at 1700px+ widths, positioned correctly outside dashboard mockup, (2) No clipping/overlap issues in hero section, (3) 4 pricing package cards visible on both landing and /pricing pages, (4) E-Tablo integration correctly shown from Standart package onwards, (5) FAQ accordions working on both pages, (6) Monthly/yearly toggle working on /pricing page, (7) Comparison section with all 8 feature rows visible.
passed_tests: Landing hero section loads correctly at 1920px width
Left floating card (Operasyon) is visible and NOT clipped at 1800px+ widths
Left floating card positioned left of dashboard mockup (x=921.2 < dash x=993.2)
Right floating card (Finans) is visible at 1800px+ widths
Hero section has overflow: visible (no clipping)
Visual wrapper has overflow: visible (no clipping)
Landing pricing section shows all 4 package cards (Giriş, Standart, Profesyonel, Platinum)
E-Tablo/Google Sheets mentioned in Standart package and above
Offer strip shows 'Google Sheets / E-Tablo entegrasyonu Standart paket ve üstünde'
Landing FAQ section has 7 FAQ items
/pricing page hero section loads with correct title
/pricing hero mentions E-Tablo/Google Sheets in subtitle
/pricing comparison section shows all 4 package headers
/pricing comparison has E-Tablo row with correct values (Giriş: —, Standart+: Dahil)
/pricing FAQ section has 7 items with working accordion
critical_code_review_comments: Floating cards use min-[1700px]:block breakpoint for visibility - correct approach to only show on wide screens
Floating card 1 uses -translate-x-8 to position outside dashboard - working correctly
Hero visual wrapper and hero section both have overflow: visible - no clipping issues
SyrocePricingCard component correctly uses getPricingForCycle() for monthly/yearly prices
Comparison table correctly uses formatComparisonValue() to show 'Dahil' for true and '—' for false
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified landing hero floating card positioning fix and new Agentis-style pricing structure. Floating cards appear only at min-[1700px] breakpoint and are correctly positioned outside the dashboard mockup. Pricing pages show 4 packages (Giriş, Standart, Profesyonel, Platinum) with E-Tablo integration starting from Standart package. Monthly/yearly toggle and FAQ accordions work correctly on both /landing and /pricing pages. All data-testid attributes are in place for UI testing.
